data.name: BrowserPlatformNotSupportedOnOlderFrameworks
data.value: Browser platform is only supported on .NET 7.0 or greater.

data.name: CannotCreateTestExecutionFilterErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to create a test execution filter

data.name: CompositeServiceFactoryInstanceAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The same instance of 'CompositeExtensionFactory' is already registered

data.name: CompositeExtensionFactoryInstantiationFailedErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to create an instance of composite extension '{0}'. See the inner exception for details.

data.name: CompositeExtensionFactoryReturnedNullInstanceErrorMessage
data.value: The factory for composite extension '{0}' returned a null instance.

data.name: ConfigurationManagerCannotFindDefaultJsonConfigurationErrorMessage
data.value: Could not find the default json configuration

data.name: ConsoleTestExecutionFilterFactoryDescription
data.value: Creates the right test execution filter for console mode

data.name: ConsoleTestExecutionFilterFactoryDisplayName
data.value: Console test execution filter factory

data.name: ExtensionDoesNotImplementGivenInterfaceErrorMessage
data.value: Extension of type '{0}' is not implementing the required '{1}' interface
data.comment: {0} is the extension type name. {1} is the required interface type name.

data.name: ExtensionWithSameUidAlreadyRegisteredErrorMessage
data.value: Extensions with the same UID '{0}' have already been registered. Registered extensions are of types: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the duplicate extension UID. {1} is the list of registered extension type names.

data.name: JsonConfigurationFileParserDuplicateKeyErrorMessage
data.value: A duplicate key '{0}' was found

data.name: JsonConfigurationFileParserTopLevelElementIsNotAnObjectErrorMessage
data.value: Top-level JSON element must be an object. Instead, '{0}' was found
data.comment: {0} is the JSON value kind that was found.

data.name: JsonConfigurationFileParserUnsupportedTokenErrorMessage
data.value: Unsupported JSON token '{0}' was found
data.comment: {0} is the unsupported JSON token type.

data.name: JsonConfigurationSectionMustBeAnObjectErrorMessage
data.value: The '{0}' section in the testconfig.json file ('{1}') must be a JSON object.
data.comment: {0} is the section name (e.g. environmentVariables). {1} is the path to the testconfig.json file. {Locked="testconfig.json"}{Locked="environmentVariables"}

data.name: JsonConfigurationSectionEntryMustBeScalarErrorMessage
data.value: The entry '{0}' under section '{1}' in the testconfig.json file ('{2}') must be a scalar string value. Nested objects and arrays are not supported.
data.comment: {0} is the full dotted/colon-separated key. {1} is the section name. {2} is the path to the testconfig.json file. {Locked="testconfig.json"}

data.name: JsonCommandLineOptionsEntryMustBeScalarOrArrayErrorMessage
data.value: The entry '{0}' under section '{1}' in the testconfig.json file ('{2}') must be either a scalar value (string, number, boolean) or an array of scalar values. Nested objects are not supported.
data.comment: {0} is the entry name relative to the section (e.g. an option name like 'timeout' or an indexed key like 'timeout:0'). {1} is the section name (commandLineOptions). {2} is the path to the testconfig.json file. {Locked="testconfig.json"}{Locked="commandLineOptions"}{Locked="timeout"}{Locked="timeout:0"}

data.name: JsonCommandLineOptionsValidationErrorPrefix
data.value: In testconfig.json under 'commandLineOptions': {0}
data.comment: {0} is the underlying validation error message (unknown option, arity mismatch, invalid arguments...). {Locked="testconfig.json"}{Locked="commandLineOptions"}

data.name: JsonCommandLineOptionIsBootstrapOnlyErrorMessage
data.value: The option '--{0}' is read during platform bootstrap (before the testconfig.json file is loaded) and must therefore be passed on the command line rather than declared under 'commandLineOptions' in testconfig.json.
data.comment: {0} is the bare bootstrap-only option name without the leading "--" (e.g. config-file, diagnostic, diagnostic-verbosity); the "--" prefix is already in the format string. {Locked="--"}{Locked="commandLineOptions"}{Locked="testconfig.json"}

data.name: TestConfigurationEnvironmentVariableProviderDisplayName
data.value: testconfig.json environment variables provider

data.name: TestConfigurationEnvironmentVariableProviderDescription
data.value: Applies environment variables declared in the 'environmentVariables' section of the testconfig.json file to the test host child process.

data.name: TestConfigurationEnvironmentVariableNameCannotBeEmptyErrorMessage
data.value: Environment variable names declared in the 'environmentVariables' section of the testconfig.json file must not be empty.

data.name: TestConfigurationEnvironmentVariableInvalidNameErrorMessage
data.value: Environment variable name '{0}' declared in the 'environmentVariables' section of the testconfig.json file is invalid. Names must not contain '=' or null characters.
data.comment: {0} is the invalid environment variable name. {Locked="environmentVariables"}{Locked="testconfig.json"}{Locked="="}

data.name: ServerTestExecutionFilterFactoryDescription
data.value: Creates the right test execution filter for server mode

data.name: ServerTestExecutionFilterFactoryDisplayName
data.value: Server test execution filter factory

data.name: ServiceProviderCannotFindServiceErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot find service of type '{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the requested service type name.

data.name: ServiceProviderServiceAlreadyRegistered
data.value: Instance of type '{0}' is already registered
data.comment: {0} is the already registered service type name.

data.name: ServiceProviderShouldNotRegisterTestFramework
data.value: Instances of type 'ITestFramework' should not be registered through the service provider but through 'ITestApplicationBuilder.RegisterTestFramework'

data.name: TestAdapterInvokerFactoryAlreadySetErrorMessage
data.value: An 'ITestFrameworkInvoker' factory is already set

data.name: TestApplicationBuilderApplicationAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The application has already been built

data.name: TestApplicationBuilderFrameworkAdapterFactoryAlreadyRegisteredErrorMessage
data.value: The test framework adapter factory has already been registered

data.name: TestApplicationBuilderTestFrameworkCapabilitiesAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The test framework capabilities factory has already been registered

data.name: TestApplicationBuilderTestFrameworkNotRegistered
data.value: The test framework adapter has not been registered. Use 'ITestApplicationBuilder.RegisterTestFramework' to register it

data.name: TestApplicationResultDescription
data.value: Determine the result of the test application execution

data.name: TestApplicationResultDisplayName
data.value: Test application result

data.name: TestApplicationVSTestModeTooManyBuilders
data.value: VSTest mode only supports a single TestApplicationBuilder per process

data.name: TestHostAdapterInvokerFailedTestSessionErrorMessage
data.value: Test adapter test session failure

data.name: TreeNodeFilterCannotContainSlashCharacterErrorMessage
data.value: A filter '{0}' should not contain a '/' character

data.name: TreeNodeFilterEscapeCharacterShouldNotBeLastErrorMessage
data.value: An escape character should not terminate the filter string '{0}'

data.name: TreeNodeFilterOnlyLastLevelCanContainMutiLevelWildcardErrorMessage
data.value: Only the final filter path can contain '**' wildcard

data.name: TreeNodeFilterOperatorNotAllowedErrorMessage
data.value: Unexpected operator '&' or '|' within filter expression '{0}'

data.name: TreeNodeFilterPathShouldStartWithSlashErrorMessage
data.value: Invalid node path, expected root as first character '{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the first character found in the invalid node path.

data.name: TreeNodeFilterUnbalancedFilterErrorMessage
data.value: Filter expression '{0}' contains an unbalanced number of '{1}' '{2}' operators
data.comment: {0} is the filter expression string. {1} and {2} are () or [] operator pairs. {Locked="()"}{Locked="[]"}

data.name: TreeNodeFilterUnexpectedSlashOperatorErrorMessage
data.value: Filter contains an unexpected '/' operator inside a parenthesized expression

data.name: TreeNodeFilterUnexpectedSlashOperatorInPathSegmentErrorMessage
data.value: Filter contains an unexpected '/' operator inside a parenthesized expression. Filter: '{0}'. To combine alternatives for one path segment, use syntax like '/A/B/C/(X|Y)'.
data.comment: {0} is the filter expression string. Diagnostic thrown by the TreeNodeFilter parser when a '/' is encountered inside a parenthesized alternative such as '/A/(B/C)'. {Locked="/"}{Locked="/A/B/C/(X|Y)"}{Locked="/A/(B/C)"}

data.name: TEstExecutionFilterFactoryFactoryAlreadySetErrorMessage
data.value: An 'ITestExecutionFilterFactory' factory is already set

data.name: CannotRemoveEnvironmentVariableAtThisStageErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot remove environment variables at this stage

data.name: CannotRemoveEnvironmentVariableItIsLockedErrorMessage
data.value: Extension '{0}' tried to remove environment variable '{1}' but it was locked by extension '{2}'
data.comment: {0} is the extension display name. {1} is the environment variable name. {2} is the display name of the extension that locked the environment variable.

data.name: CannotSetEnvironmentVariableAtThisStageErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot set environment variables at this stage

data.name: CannotSetEnvironmentVariableItIsLockedErrorMessage
data.value: Extension '{0}' tried to set environment variable '{1}' but it was locked by extension '{2}'
data.comment: {0} is the extension display name. {1} is the environment variable name. {2} is the display name of the extension that locked the environment variable.

data.name: ProcessHasNotYetExitedErrorMessage
data.value: Process should have exited before we can determine this value

data.name: CannotStartProcessErrorMessage
data.value: Cannot start process '{0}'

data.name: EnvironmentVariableProviderFailedWithError
data.value: Provider '{0}' (UID: {1}) failed with error: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the provider display name. {1} is the provider UID. {2} is the error message.

data.name: GlobalValidationOfTestHostEnvironmentVariablesFailedErrorMessage
data.value: The following 'ITestHostEnvironmentVariableProvider' providers rejected the final environment variables setup:

data.name: TestFrameworkProxyApiShouldNotBeCalled
data.value: Method '{0}' should not have been called on this proxy object

data.name: TestProcessDidNotExitGracefullyErrorMessage
data.value: Test application process didn't exit gracefully, exit code is '{0}'

data.name: CannotCreateUniqueLogFileErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to create a unique log file after 3 seconds. Lastly tried file name is '{0}'.
data.comment: {0} is the last log file name that was tried.

data.name: FailedToWriteLogToChannelErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to write the log to the channel. Missed log content: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the log content that could not be written.

data.name: ServerLogMessageDescription
data.value: This data represents a server log message

data.name: ServerLogMessageDisplayName
data.value: Server log message

data.name: TimeoutAcquiringSemaphoreErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to acquire semaphore before timeout of '{0}' seconds

data.name: TimeoutFlushingLogsErrorMessage
data.value: Failed to flush logs to log file '{0}' before the timeout of '{1}' seconds. The log file may be incomplete.
data.comment: {0} is the log file path. {1} is the timeout in seconds.

data.name: UnexpectedExceptionInFileLoggerErrorMessage
data.value: An unexpected exception occurred in the 'FileLogger' write loop for log file '{0}'. The log file may be incomplete. {1}
data.comment: {0} is the log file path. {1} is the exception ToString output. {Locked="FileLogger"}

data.name: RetryFailedAfterTriesErrorMessage
data.value: Retry failed after {0} times

data.name: CommandLineInvalidArgumentsForOption
data.value: Option '--{0}' has invalid arguments: {1}
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the invalid argument value or validation error.

data.name: CommandLineInvalidConfiguration
data.value: Invalid configuration for provider '{0}' (UID: {1}). Error: {2}
data.comment: {0} is the provider display name. {1} is the provider UID. {2} is the configuration error message.

data.name: CommandLineOptionExpectsAtLeastArguments
data.value: Option '--{0}' from provider '{1}' (UID: {2}) expects at least {3} arguments
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the provider display name. {2} is the provider UID. {3} is the minimum number of expected arguments.

data.name: CommandLineOptionExpectsAtMostArguments
data.value: Option '--{0}' from provider '{1}' (UID: {2}) expects at most {3} arguments
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the provider display name. {2} is the provider UID. {3} is the maximum number of expected arguments.

data.name: CommandLineOptionExpectsNoArguments
data.value: Option '--{0}' from provider '{1}' (UID: {2}) expects no arguments
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the provider display name. {2} is the provider UID.

data.name: CommandLineOptionIsUsingReservedPrefix
data.value: Option `--{0}` from provider '{1}' (UID: {2}) is using the reserved prefix '--internal'
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the provider display name. {2} is the provider UID. {Locked="--internal"}

data.name: CommandLineUnknownOption
data.value: Unknown option '--{0}'
data.comment: {0} is the unknown option name without the leading dashes.

data.name: InvalidCommandLineArguments
data.value: Invalid command line arguments:

data.name: CommandLineValidationCommandLine
data.value: Command line: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the command line used to run the application.

data.name: CommandLineInvalidArityErrorMessage
data.value: Invalid arity, maximum must be greater than minimum

data.name: CommandLineInvalidOptionName
data.value: Invalid option name '{0}', it must contain only letter and '-' (e.g. my-option)

data.name: CommandLineOptionIsDeclaredByMultipleProviders
data.value: Option '--{0}' is declared by multiple providers: '{1}'
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the list of provider display names.

data.name: CommandLineOptionIsDeclaredByMultipleProvidersWorkaround
data.value: You can fix the previous option clash by overriding the option name using the configuration file

data.name: CommandLineOptionIsReserved
data.value: Option '--{0}' is reserved and cannot be used by providers: '{1}'
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {1} is the list of provider display names.

data.name: CommandLineParserUnexpectedArgument
data.value: Unexpected argument {0}

data.name: CommandLineParserUnexpectedSingleQuoteInArgument
data.value: Unexpected single quote in argument: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the command-line argument containing the unexpected single quote.

data.name: CommandLineParserUnexpectedSingleQuoteInArgumentForOption
data.value: Unexpected single quote in argument: {0} for option '--{1}'
data.comment: {0} is the command-line argument containing the unexpected single quote. {1} is the option name without the leading dashes.

data.name: HelpApplicationUsage
data.value: Usage {0} [option providers] [extension option providers]
data.comment: {0} is the application name used in the usage line.

data.name: HelpExecuteTestApplication
data.value: Execute a .NET Test Application.

data.name: HelpExtensionOptions
data.value: Extension options:

data.name: HelpNoExtensionRegistered
data.value: No extension registered.

data.name: HelpOptions
data.value: Options:

data.name: HelpTestApplicationRunner
data.value: <test application runner>

data.name: NotAvailable
data.value: Not available

data.name: NotFound
data.value: Not found

data.name: PlatformCommandLineClientHostOptionDescription
data.value: Specify the hostname of the client.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineClientPortOptionDescription
data.value: Specify the port of the client.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticFileLoggerSynchronousWriteOptionDescription
data.value: Force the built-in file logger to write the log synchronously. Useful for scenario where you don't want to lose any log (i.e. in case of crash). Note that this is slowing down the test execution.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticOptionDescription
data.value: Enable the diagnostic logging. The default log level is 'Trace'. The file will be written in the output directory with the name log_[yyMMddHHmmssfff].diag

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticOptionExpectsSingleArgumentErrorMessage
data.value: '--diagnostic-verbosity' expects a single level argument ('Trace', 'Debug', 'Information', 'Warning', 'Error', or 'Critical')

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticOptionIsMissing
data.value: '--{0}' requires '--diagnostic' to be provided
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes. {Locked="--diagnostic"}

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticOutputDirectoryOptionDescription
data.value: Output directory of the diagnostic logging. If not specified the file will be generated inside the default 'TestResults' directory.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticOutputFilePrefixOptionDescription
data.value: Prefix for the log file name that will replace '[log]_.'

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiagnosticVerbosityOptionDescription
data.value: Define the level of the verbosity for the --diagnostic. The available values are 'Trace', 'Debug', 'Information', 'Warning', 'Error', and 'Critical'.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiscoverTestsOptionDescription
data.value: List available tests. Optionally accepts 'text' (the default human-readable output) or 'json' to print the discovered tests as a JSON document on standard output.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDiscoverTestsInvalidArgument
data.value: '--list-tests' received unexpected value '{0}'. Supported values are: {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the unexpected option value. {1} is the comma-separated list of supported values. {Locked="--list-tests"}{Locked="text"}{Locked="json"}

data.name: PlatformCommandLineHelpOptionDescription
data.value: Show the command line help.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineInfoOptionDescription
data.value: Display .NET test application information.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineMinimumExpectedTestsIncompatibleDiscoverTests
data.value: '--list-tests' and '--minimum-expected-tests' are incompatible options

data.name: PlatformCommandLineMinimumExpectedTestsOptionSingleArgument
data.value: '--minimum-expected-tests' expects a single non-zero positive integer value (e.g. '--minimum-expected-tests 10')

data.name: PlatformCommandLineNoBannerOptionDescription
data.value: Do not display the startup banner, the copyright message or the telemetry banner.

data.name: PlatformCommandLinePortOptionDescription
data.value: Specify the port of the server.

data.name: PlatformCommandLinePortOptionSingleArgument
data.value: '--{0}' expects a single valid port as argument
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineProviderDescription
data.value: Microsoft Testing Platform command line provider

data.name: PlatformCommandLineProviderDisplayName
data.value: Platform command line provider

data.name: PlatformCommandLineResultDirectoryOptionDescription
data.value: The directory where the test results are going to be placed. If the specified directory doesn't exist, it's created. The default is TestResults in the directory that contains the test application.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineServerOptionDescription
data.value: Enable the server mode.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineServerInvalidArgument
data.value: '--server' received unexpected value '{0}'. Supported values are: {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the unexpected protocol value. {1} is the comma-separated list of supported protocol values. {Locked="--server"}{Locked="jsonrpc"}{Locked="dotnettestcli"}

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDotnetTestCliRequiresPipe
data.value: '--server {0}' requires '--{1}' to be specified.
data.comment: {0} is the server protocol value. {1} is the required option name without the leading dashes. {Locked="--server"}{Locked="dotnettestcli"}{Locked="dotnet-test-pipe"}

data.name: PlatformCommandLineSkipBuildersNumberCheckOptionDescription
data.value: For testing purposes

data.name: PlatformCommandLineTestHostControllerPIDOptionDescription
data.value: Eventual parent test host controller PID.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDotnetTestPipe
data.value: dotnet test pipe.

data.name: TreeNodeFilterDescription
data.value: Use a tree filter to filter down the tests to execute

data.name: ConnectingToClientHost
data.value: Connecting to client host '{0}' port '{1}'
data.comment: {0} is the client host name. {1} is the client port.

data.name: JsonRpcTcpServerDescription
data.value: JsonRpc server implementation based on the test platform protocol specification.

data.name: JsonRpcTcpServerToSingleClientDescription
data.value: JsonRpc server to client handshake, implementation based on the test platform protocol specification.

data.name: TelemetryNotice
data.value:
Telemetry --------- Microsoft Testing Platform collects usage data in order to help us improve your experience. The data is collected by Microsoft and are not shared with anyone. You can opt-out of telemetry by setting the TESTINGPLATFORM_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT or DOTNET_CLI_TELEMETRY_OPTOUT environment variable to '1' or 'true' using your favorite shell.
Read more about Microsoft Testing Platform telemetry: https://aka.ms/testingplatform/telemetry

data.name: TelemetryProviderAlreadySetErrorMessage
data.value: Telemetry provider is already set

data.name: UnexpectedCallTelemetryIsDisabledErrorMessage
data.value: Unexpected telemetry call, the telemetry is disabled.

data.name: CouldNotFindDirectoryErrorMessage
data.value: Could not find directory '{0}'

data.name: InternalLoopAsyncDidNotExitSuccessfullyErrorMessage
data.value: Method '{0}' did not exit successfully

data.name: NamedPipePathTooLongErrorMessage
data.value: The named pipe path '{0}' is {1} bytes long, which exceeds the maximum of {2} bytes allowed for a Unix domain socket. Use a shorter directory by setting the '{3}' environment variable, or by setting 'TMPDIR' when '{3}' is not set.
data.comment: {0} is the full pipe path, {1} is its length in bytes, {2} is the maximum allowed length in bytes, {3} is the environment variable name. Do not translate 'TMPDIR' or the environment variable name.

data.name: NamedPipeDirectoryNotWritableErrorMessage
data.value: The named pipe directory '{0}' does not exist or is not writable: {1}. Set the '{2}' environment variable to an existing writable directory, or unset it to fall back to the default temporary directory.
data.comment: {0} is the directory path, {1} is the underlying error message, {2} is the environment variable name. Do not translate the environment variable name.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineIgnoreExitCodeOptionDescription
data.value: Do not report non successful exit value for specific exit codes (e.g. '--ignore-exit-code 8;9' ignore exit code 8 and 9 and will return 0 in these case)

data.name: PlatformCommandLineExitOnProcessExitOptionDescription
data.value: Exit the test process if dependent process exits. PID must be provided.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineExitOnProcessExitSingleArgument
data.value: '--{0}' expects a single int PID argument
data.comment: {0} is the option name without the leading dashes.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineExitOnProcessExitInvalidDependentProcess
data.value: Invalid PID '{0}' {1}
data.comment: {0} is the invalid process ID. {1} is the exception message.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineExitOnProcessExitNotSupportedInBrowser
data.value: The '--exit-on-process-exit' option is not supported in browser environments.

data.name: Aborted
data.value: Aborted

data.name: CancellingTestSession
data.value: Canceling the test session...

data.name: PressCtrlCAgainToForceExit
data.value: Press Ctrl+C again to force exit.

data.name: ShutdownProgressStillWaitingPrefix
data.value: Still waiting for:
data.comment: Prefix for the message that lists extensions that have not yet completed their shutdown work. Each entry is formatted as "{DisplayName} ({Phase}, {Seconds}s)" and entries are separated by "; ". {Locked="{DisplayName} ({Phase}, {Seconds}s)"}{Locked="; "}

data.name: DiagnosticFileLevelWithAsyncFlush
data.value: Diagnostic file (level '{0}' with async flush): {1}
data.comment: {0} is the diagnostic log level, such as verbose. {1} is the path to the diagnostic log file.

data.name: DiagnosticFileLevelWithFlush
data.value: Diagnostic file (level '{0}' with sync flush): {1}
data.comment: {0} is the diagnostic log level, such as verbose. {1} is the path to the diagnostic log file.

data.name: Failed
data.value: Failed

data.name: FailedLowercase
data.value: failed

data.name: Passed
data.value: Passed

data.name: Skipped
data.value: Skipped

data.name: SkippedLowercase
data.value: skipped

data.name: StackTrace
data.value: Stack Trace

data.name: Total
data.value: Total

data.name: TotalLowercase
data.value: total

data.name: ZeroTestsRan
data.value: Zero tests ran

data.name: FailedWithErrors
data.value: failed with {0} error(s)

data.name: FailedWithErrorsAndWarnings
data.value: failed with {0} error(s) and {1} warning(s)
data.comment: {0} is the number of errors. {1} is the number of warnings.

data.name: FailedWithWarnings
data.value: failed with {0} warning(s)

data.name: RunningTestsFrom
data.value: Running tests from

data.name: FromFile
data.value: from
data.comment: from followed by a file name to point to the file from which test is originating

data.name: TerminalNoProgressDeprecatedWarning
data.value: warning: --no-progress is deprecated; use --progress off instead.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineTimeoutArgumentErrorMessage
data.value: 'timeout' option should have one argument as a time value with an explicit unit suffix and a positive numeric value within the supported range (up to ~49.7 days). Accepted suffixes are 'ms'/'mil(s)'/'millisecond(s)', 's'/'sec(s)'/'second(s)', 'm'/'min(s)'/'minute(s)', 'h'/'hour(s)', and 'd'/'day(s)', e.g. '500ms', '5400s', '90m', '1.5h', '1d'.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineTimeoutOptionDescription
data.value: A global test execution timeout. Takes one argument as a time value with an explicit unit suffix. Accepted suffixes are 'ms'/'mil(s)'/'millisecond(s)', 's'/'sec(s)'/'second(s)', 'm'/'min(s)'/'minute(s)', 'h'/'hour(s)', and 'd'/'day(s)', e.g. '500ms', '5400s', '90m', '1.5h', '1d'.

data.name: LoggerFactoryNotReady
data.value: The ILoggerFactory has not been built yet.

data.name: MessageBusNotReady
data.value: The message bus has not been built yet or is no more usable at this stage.

data.name: CommandLineOptionsNotReady
data.value: The ICommandLineOptions has not been built yet.

data.name: MissingClientPortFoJsonRpc
data.value: Expected --client-port when jsonRpc protocol is used.

data.name: DiscoveringTestsFrom
data.value: Discovering tests from

data.name: TestDiscoverySummary
data.value: Test discovery summary: found {0} test(s) in {1} assemblies.
data.comment: {0} is the number of discovered tests. {1} is the count of assemblies.

data.name: DiscoveredTestsInAssembly
data.value: Discovered {0} test(s) in assembly
data.comment: {0} is the number of discovered tests. The sentence is followed by the assembly path.

data.name: ExitCode
data.value: Exit code

data.name: CommandLineParserResponseFileNotFound
data.value: The response file '{0}' was not found

data.name: CommandLineParserFailedToReadResponseFile
data.value: Failed to read response file '{0}'. {1}.
data.comment: {0} is the response file path. {1} is the full exception detail (ToString), not just the exception message.

data.name: CommandLineParserUnclosedQuoteInResponseFile
data.value: Unclosed quote in response file at line {0}
data.comment: {0} is the line number in the response file.

data.name: CommandLineParserUnclosedQuoteInCommandLine
data.value: Unclosed quote in command line

data.name: PlatformCommandLineMinimumExpectedTestsOptionDescription
data.value: Specifies the minimum number of tests that are expected to run.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineZeroTestsPolicyOptionDescription
data.value: Specifies how a run that executed no tests is treated. Valid values are 'allow-skipped' (the default) which counts skipped tests as run, so only a run where no test was found at all fails with exit code 8, and 'strict' which treats skipped tests as not run, so a run where every test was skipped (or no test was found) fails with exit code 8.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineZeroTestsPolicyInvalidArgument
data.value: Invalid value '{0}' for '--zero-tests-policy'. Valid values are {1}.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineConfigFileOptionDescription
data.value: Specifies a testconfig.json file.

data.name: ConfigurationFileNotFound
data.value: The configuration file '{0}' specified with '--config-file' could not be found.

data.name: ActiveTestsRunning_MoreTestsCount
data.value: and {0} more
data.comment: {0} is the number of additional active tests.

data.name: ActiveTestsRunning_FullTestsCount
data.value: {0} tests running
data.comment: {0} is the number of currently running tests.

data.name: StartingTestSession
data.value: Starting test session.

data.name: StartingTestSessionWithLogFilePath
data.value: Starting test session. The log file path is '{0}'.

data.name: FinishedTestSession
data.value: Finished test session.

data.name: ServerTestHostDisplayName
data.value: Server mode test host

data.name: ServerTestHostDescription
data.value: The 'ITestHost' implementation used when running server mode.

data.name: UnobservedTaskExceptionWarningMessage
data.value: [ServerTestHost.OnTaskSchedulerUnobservedTaskException] Unhandled exception: {0}
data.comment: {0} is the exception that was unhandled/unobserved. {Locked="ServerTestHost.OnTaskSchedulerUnobservedTaskException"}

data.name: ExceptionDuringCancellationWarningMessage
data.value: Exception during the cancellation of request id '{0}'

data.name: DeprecatedEnvironmentVariableWarning
data.value: Warning: The environment variable '{0}' is deprecated and will be removed in a future major version. Use '{1}' instead.
data.comment: {0} is the deprecated environment variable name. {1} is the replacement environment variable name.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineMaxFailedTestsOptionDescription
data.value: Specifies a maximum number of test failures that, when exceeded, will abort the test run.

data.name: MaxFailedTestsMustBePositive
data.value: The option '--maximum-failed-tests' must be a positive integer. The value '{0}' is not valid.

data.name: AbortForMaxFailedTestsDescription
data.value: Extension used to support '--maximum-failed-tests'. When a given failures threshold is reached, the test run will be aborted.

data.name: ReachedMaxFailedTestsMessage
data.value: Test session is aborting due to reaching failures ('{0}') specified by the '--maximum-failed-tests' option.
data.comment: {0} is the number of max failed tests. {Locked="--maximum-failed-tests"}

data.name: AbortForMaxFailedTestsCapabilityNotAvailable
data.value: The current test framework does not implement 'IGracefulStopTestExecutionCapability' which is required for '--maximum-failed-tests' feature.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineFilterUidOptionDescription
data.value: Provides a list of test node UIDs to filter by.

data.name: OnlyOneFilterSupported
data.value: Passing both '--treenode-filter' and '--filter-uid' is unsupported.

data.name: OnlyOneTestHostLauncherSupported
data.value: Only one test host launcher can be registered.

data.name: PlatformCommandLineDebugAttachOptionDescription
data.value: Allows to pause execution in order to attach to the process for debug purposes.

data.name: SucceededLowercase
data.value: succeeded

data.name: ChatClientProviderAlreadyRegistered
data.value: A chat client provider has already been registered.

data.name: TestHostControllerProcessRestartNotSupportedOnWebAssembly
data.value: Test host controller extensions that require process restart are not supported on browser/WebAssembly platforms.

data.name: SyncFlushNotSupportedInBrowserErrorMessage
data.value: Synchronous flush is not supported in browser environments.

data.name: WaitDebuggerAttachNotSupportedInBrowserErrorMessage
data.value: Waiting for debugger to attach (TESTINGPLATFORM_WAIT_ATTACH_DEBUGGER=1) is not supported in browser environments.

data.name: WaitDebuggerAttachNotSupportedInWasiErrorMessage
data.value: Waiting for debugger to attach (TESTINGPLATFORM_WAIT_ATTACH_DEBUGGER=1) is not supported on wasi.
